calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the order to appear that was issued on January 14, 2021 informed Eileen McGovern that if there was no appearance, the petition would be taken off calendar. There being no appearance at today's hearing and no appearance at the previous hearing, the Second Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and the order to appear are off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Continued To Feb-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner Eileen J. McGovern to appear on February 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why she has not cured the defects/issues that were raised in the Probate Examiner's notes and the tentative ruling, and to show why the second amended petition should not be taken off calendar. If there is no appearance at the order to appear, the petition will go off calendar. The Second Amended Petition for Probate is continued to February 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
